passive.player.description: If this unit perishes the run is lost.
passive.bloodfeeding.name: Bloodfeeding
passive.bloodfeeding.description:
If this unit damages a target with Bleed, heal half of damage dealt.
This effect can trigger once per turn.
passive.bloodstarved.name: Starving For Blood
passive.bloodstarved.description:
If this unit is an Undead, targets the enemy with the most stacks of Bleed. If no such enemy exists, targets randomly.
If this unit has the passive ability "Bloodfeeding", at the start of the second turn onwards, if this unit failed to heal from its effect last turn, gains 1 Fragile.
passive.preparation.name: Preparation
passive.preparation.description: At the start of the first turn, draws 2 cards.
passive.bulkyarmor.name: Bulky Armor
passive.bulkyarmor.description: At the start of the turn, gains 2 Protection.
passive.boss.name: Boss Enemy
passive.boss.description: At the start of the turn, draws the deck and recovers up to maximum mana.
passive.copycat.name: Copycat
passive.copycat.description: At the start of the battle, removes all cards from hand and deck. Copies the player unit's deck and stats.
passive.prepared.name: Prepared
passive.prepared.description: At the start of the turn, draws 2 cards.
